name: OpenSSF Scorecard: Pinned-Dependencies
description: Verify that all dependencies in GitHub Actions workflows, Dockerfiles, and package manifests are pinned to specific hashes or immutable versions rather than mutable tags. Unpinned dependencies are vulnerable to tag hijacking and supply chain substitution attacks.
match: GitHub Actions using tag references (e.g. @v4) instead of SHA pins, container images using :latest or mutable tags
replacement: pin all GitHub Actions to full commit SHA, pin container images to digest, use lockfiles for package dependencies
